decor.uid: Creating a profile if they have not got a profile.
Try to load properties from the profile. (Just money and login so far)
Activate triggers and timers that may use money once everything has been loaded properly.
You earn money for killing people :D
Define all the variables at the start so no weird bugs can happen.
Save money to server so next time you join the map it can be loaded again.
You earn money for killing stronger people.
You earn money for killing boss!
Reset money command.
Stop limb breaking so that people can always be healed and slowed down the game a bit to make it easier to play.
Show current money.
Show money leaderboards.
Help new players on how to play.
Reset game command.
Reset game (vote)
Add mining area where you can mine ore and sell it to this guy for money.
Add waves arena where you can fight enemies endlessly and come back for money.
Add slots menu where you can earn money if you win.
Add challenges where everyone can join and participate for 1st place. (Entry fee: 1% of player's money.
Help command.
Revive command.
You earn money for killing players!

trigger.actions_7_targetA: You earned $randomProfit for killing an enemy! Current money: $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney
You earned $randomProfit for killing an enemy! Current money: $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney

trigger.actions_6_targetA: You bought Armor 1! You now have $profileMoney
You bought Armor 2! You now have $profileMoney
You bought Armor 3! You now have $profileMoney
You bought Armor 4! You now have $profileMoney
You bought Armor 5! You now have $profileMoney
You bought Armor 6! You now have $profileMoney
You bought Armor 7! You now have $profileMoney

trigger.actions_7_targetA: You earned $randomProfit for killing a boss! Current money: $profileMoney
trigger.actions_8_targetA: You completed the map! Feel free to rejoin and replay the map with your current money (or you can reset it with -resetMoney command)

trigger.actions_2_targetA: Money has been reset! (You need to stay in the match for longer so that it is saved to server)

trigger.actions_1_targetA: In this map, you kill enemies and complete side missions to gain money! You use this money to buy weapons and armor.

trigger.actions_7_targetA: You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney
You bought selectedGun! You now have $profileMoney

trigger.actions_4_targetA: First vote to restart the round is by loginName (1/3)

trigger.actions_5_targetA: Second vote to restart the round is by loginName (2/3)
Third vote to restart the round is by loginName (3/3)

trigger.actions_3_targetA: Can you please bring this to the base with Civil Security Heavies inside?
Yo! Plant this somewhere in the grass.
'ppreciate it! Here's the $randomProfit dollars you wanted.

trigger.actions_4_targetA: Do you mind spelling out the word ''Pineapple'' backwards

trigger.actions_6_targetA: Thanks! Here's your $randomProfit like I promised.
trigger.actions_7_targetA: Try again in 5 minutes!

trigger.actions_4_targetA: Which animal has the best sense of smell? I'm curious.

trigger.actions_6_targetA: Damn, thanks for that. I'll give you $randomProfit just for your helpfulness.
trigger.actions_7_targetA: Try again in 5 minutes!

trigger.actions_1_targetA: Question and Pineapple Task is now available!

trigger.actions_5_targetA: Greetings, come train with us in our experimental Arena. I'll pay you depending on how much kills you get.

trigger.actions_8_targetA: Good job. You killed arenaKills, so I will pay you the humble amount $profitMoney.

trigger.actions_3_targetA: Aaaaaahhh.. You got me. I'm a professional ghost, but now.. you've ruined me. Take $profitMoney and leave.

trigger.actions_2_targetA: Get me some ore!!!! I'll pay you :)
trigger.actions_8_targetA: Wow you mined minedOre, guess I'll also pay you $profitMoney.

trigger.actions_5_targetA: Welcome to my mini casino.. You know you want to gamble :)

trigger.actions_7_targetA: You won $20,000! You now have $profileMoney

trigger.actions_3_targetA: You lost. Better luck next time. You now have $profileMoney

trigger.actions_2_targetA: You don't have enough money. Get $10,000 and come back.
In this map, you kill enemies and complete side missions to gain money! You use this money to buy weapons and armor.

trigger.actions_5_targetA: You have been revived! reviveUse revive(s) left.

trigger.actions_1_targetA: You mined Diamond ore! Continue mining and sell it at the Side Missions teleport to earn money.
You mined Gold ore! Continue mining and sell it at the Side Missions teleport to earn money.
You mined Stone! Continue mining and sell it at the Side Missions teleport to earn money.
trigger.actions_2_targetA: The amount of ore you gain from stone is dependant on the damage of your gun.

trigger.actions_1_targetA: You mined Iron ore! Continue mining and sell it at the Side Missions teleport to earn money.

trigger.actions_3_targetA: whoIsBetting is betting for someone to win in NPC Gladiator! The entry fee is $10,000

trigger.actions_1_targetA: You win nothing! You now have $profileMoney.
Saved $profileMoney of your profile to server!

trigger.actions_6_targetA: You bought reviveUse revive(s)! Use -revive command to trigger.

trigger.actions_3_targetB: You need to wait a full day!
trigger.actions_4_targetA: You need to wait a full day!
trigger.actions_5_targetB: You need to wait a full day!
trigger.actions_8_targetA: You did the daily task! Your money is now $profileMoney

trigger.actions_7_targetA: You won $75,000! You now have $profileMoney

trigger.actions_3_targetA: You lost. Better luck next time. You now have $profileMoney

trigger.actions_2_targetA: You don't have enough money. Get $50,000 and come back.

trigger.actions_7_targetA: You won $150,000! You now have $profileMoney

trigger.actions_3_targetA: You lost. Better luck next time. You now have $profileMoney

trigger.actions_2_targetA: You don't have enough money. Get $100,000 and come back.

trigger.actions_8_targetA: You earned $randomProfit for killing a player! Current money: $profileMoney

trigger.actions_5_targetA: You lost -$randomProfit for dying to a player!
